Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Request for optional upgrade such as adventure travel or home office protection within remaining budget margin', 'Mention of entertainment or gaming coverage option for property insurance', 'Premium Insurance Membership 15% multi-policy discount', 'Request to issue a detailed enrollment summary with available start dates (summary document not directly representable)', 'Specific exclusion of cosmetic or elective treatments (no field for exclusions list)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Health insurance plans with monthly cost, deductible, coverage tier, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, 24/7 support, preventive care, family therapy, crisis intervention, and mental health coverage', 'Property insurance plan with monthly cost, deductible, coverage for electronics, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster coverage', 'Travel insurance plan with deductible, trip cancellation, baggage protection, medical evacuation, business travel protection, and 24/7 support', 'Preventive care add-on package with executive health programs and wellness optimization', 'Global coverage yes/no field for international travel', 'Pre-existing conditions coverage yes/no field', 'Emergency support 24/7 field', 'Claims processing time 3–10 business days field', 'Coverage limit and deductible percentage fields', 'Family coverage included yes/no field', 'Service features like concierge support, direct billing, multilingual support', 'Cost analysis with monthly and annual savings estimation', 'Comparison metrics showing improved coverage and lower cost', 'Information request fields covering health assessment, financial and coverage preference data']
